comment: CMU motion capture data used in this project is redistributable under the CMU mocap license (http://mocap.cs.cmu.edu/).

sources.name: CMU MoCap Swordplay
sources.license: CMU Mocap License (redistributable for research/educational use)

provenance.dataset: CMU Graphics Lab Motion Capture Database
provenance.bvh_conversion: Bruce Hahne / cgspeed.com MotionBuilder-friendly BVH release

sources.rationale: Subject 2 contains actual swordplay clips (02_07, 02_08, 02_09). 02_07 is selected as the Strike/Longsword/Top source because it is the longest swordplay take, stays relatively planted, and contains clear overhead/overhand striking motions. This replaces the previous boxing clip (14_01), which was semantically a punch rather than a longsword top strike.

clips.description: Swordplay - alternative take with more footwork

sources.name: CMU MoCap Standing Idle
sources.license: CMU Mocap License (redistributable for research/educational use)

provenance.dataset: CMU Graphics Lab Motion Capture Database
provenance.bvh_conversion: Bruce Hahne / cgspeed.com MotionBuilder-friendly BVH release

sources.rationale: 113_21 is explicitly labeled 'Standing Still' and visually matches a calm, breathing-in-place idle: the actor stays planted with only small weight shifts and minimal arm motion. It replaces 140_06, which contained too much wandering and arm movement for a neutral idle, and avoids T-pose/calibration clips such as 87_02 or 140_05.

clips.description: Idle - previous alternative take (kept for reference)

sources.name: Mixamo Sword/Shield Pack
